item.title: This weekend, I improved my mobile fitness app and built a mcp server for it so I can get my latest ...
item.description:
This weekend, I improved my mobile fitness app and built a mcp server for it so I can get my latest workout stats and update the app's workouts via Claude/Codex/etc.
This shit is too fun. https://t.co/bSzpGbkvPP
--- @petergyang | ❤️ 1 | 🔁 0 | 💬 0 | 👁 340
item.author: @petergyang

item.title: managed agents now come with cross-session memory which you can inspect and port wherever you'd like
